scope: 12 phenotype-org repos under the eval, benchmarking, profiling, QA/QEng, and compute/infra spine
excluded_lanes: work-tracking (agileplus, tracera are SSOT — not owner of)

pillars.name: SOTA: criterion regression baseline store (SQLite + sha256)
SOTA: Harbor task fixture bundle committed
SOTA: gVisor / Firecracker / WASM tier abstraction

repos.name: Benchora
notable: CLI binary benchora (run/report/baseline/compare/list) shipped in commit 6c3ad0f
SQLite + sha256 baseline store is SOTA for the org
AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md absent — owner should add for cross-agent coordination

repos.name: portage
repos.lane: eval (Harbor fork — agent evals + RL envs)
notable: Upstream Harbor fork with active L7-001 propagation branch (wip/2026-06-18-portage-l7-001-propagation)
feat/phenotype-request-id-adopt branch active
16+ active branches, dual portage/harbor source tree

repos.name: pheno-harness
notable: 999-file commit 7607ffd: 995 BurntSushi__ripgrep task fixtures + state/* JSONs
eval/pillars.py, eval/route_matrix.py, eval/tbench.py, eval/nested_rlvr.py, eval/budget.py present
pheno/harbor_util.py + pheno/model_manager.py + pheno/paths.py — the eval spine
AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md absent — owner should add for cross-agent coordination

repos.name: phenodag
notable: modernc.org/sqlite (pure-Go SQLite, no CGO) is SOTA
POSIX flock + atomic SQLite claims — multi-agent safe
presets/ directory referenced in README but absent — needs follow-up (DAG-T2-001)

repos.name: Tracera
notable: 1804-line pyproject.toml with full SOTA Python toolchain (ruff, ty, vulture, radon, tach, interrogate, pycln, import-linter, bandit, pip-audit, semgrep, hatchling, uv)
18 optional-dependency groups including ml, distributed, observability, security
Hybrid Rust + Python (backend/internal/config/ + src/tracertm/)
src/tracertm/{adapters,api,cli,database,ml,models,performance,ports,repositories,scoring,self_tracing,services,storage}/ fully fleshed
Sparse-checkout disabled — full working tree at HEAD

repos.name: heliosBench
notable: psutil + rich + pyyaml v0.1.0; comparison mode, leak detection, JSON output
Phase 3 work-state README header committed in 77800aa (PR #177)
Inspired by Terminal-Bench; CLI helios-bench

repos.name: nanovms
notable: Go + TypeScript monorepo
gVisor/Firecracker/WASM tier abstraction is SOTA

repos.name: PhenoCompose

repos.name: phenotype-org-audits
notable: audit-30-pillar/{L0..L26}.md holds the 30 pillar definitions

This scorecard will land in findings/2026-06-23-eval-bench-qa-v1.json
